next_steps: Serum and urine immunofixation electrophoresis and serum free light chain assay to rule out AL amyloidosis
Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scintigraphy to evaluate for transthyretin cardiac amyloidosis
Genetic testing for the GLA gene (Fabry disease) and hereditary amyloidosis genes
Dermatologic evaluation of the truncal angiomas to assess for angiokeratomas
Otolaryngology evaluation to assess for laryngeal amyloid infiltration as a cause of hoarseness
Consider endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive testing is inconclusive
